name: memory.recall: per-call timeout -> fixture surfaces it; dispatch survives
doc: host reads the request and never replies; after the per-call timeout the SDK raises a timeout error; the fixture publishes {timed_out:true} and the dispatch loop still answers shutdown
manifest:

id = "confplugin"
version = "0.1.0"
name = "Conf"
description = "conformance fixture"
min_nexo_version = ">=0.1.0"
